---
title: Library
listing:
  - id: books
    contents: books
    sort: "date desc"
    type: table
    categories: numbered
    page-size: 12
    sort-ui: true
    filter-ui: true
    feed:
      items: 1000
    table-hover: false
    table-striped: false
    fields: [date, title, description]
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
comments: false
---
